title: bupleurum handiense
intro: Bupleurum handiense, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or Chinese bock, is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bupleurum handiense include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and joint pain, and supporting the immune system. Bupleurum handiense can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
